name: ChatBox

slots.name: root
slots.description: The outermost container element. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: layout
slots.description: The layout element that arranges conversations + thread panes. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: conversationsPane
slots.description: The conversations pane container. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: threadPane
slots.description: The thread pane container. Defaults to `div`.

slots.name: conversationHeaderInfo
slots.description: Override the conversation header info wrapper (title + subtitle column).

slots.name: conversationHeaderActions
slots.description: Override the conversation header actions component.

slots.name: messageRoot
slots.description: Override the message root component for each message.

slots.name: composerHelperText
slots.description: Override the composer helper text component.

slots.name: suggestions
slots.description: Override the prompt suggestions container component.
